name: jira-mcp
description: Jira MCP Server – issue search (JQL), create, update, comment, status transitions, and project listing for security incident management

tools.name: jira_health_check
tools.description: Test connection, verify credentials, and get account/server info

tools.name: search_issues
tools.description: Search Jira issues using JQL query language

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Get full details of a single issue including description and comments

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue (incident, task, bug, etc.)

tools.name: update_issue
tools.description: Update summary, description, priority, or labels of an existing issue

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to record investigation findings or actions

tools.name: list_transitions
tools.description: List available status transitions for an issue

tools.name: transition_issue
tools.description: Move an issue to a new status (e.g. In Progress, Resolved, Closed)

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all accessible Jira projects with keys and types
